steps.title: Use the constant ratio
steps.content:
The equation choices are all of the form $f(x)=kx$. For a proportional relationship, $k$ is the ratio
$$\frac{f(x)}{x}$$
from any row of the table.

steps.title: Match the table ratio
steps.content:
The table shows the same ratio for each row:
$$\frac{f(x)}{x}=1.8$$
So the equation is $f(x)=1.8x$. The answer is B.
